annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Tex. Fin. Code Sec. 304.102 — 6.75% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from Texas’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at statutes.capitol.texas.gov. Not legal advice.
